title: Interaction
description: Base ascription schema for Interaction ElementDefinitions. Defines the causal binding by referencing an Effector and a Receptor port. Tenant-defined archetypes extending Interaction MUST reference this schema via allOf.

effectorId.description: Identifier of the Effector ElementDefinition that is the emitting endpoint (Interaction.from).

receptorId.description: Identifier of the Receptor ElementDefinition that is the receiving endpoint (Interaction.to).
